description_for_human: Industrial inkjet printing technology company. Provides info on digital printing systems, coil coating solutions, UV-LED curing, and specialty inks.
description_for_model: IQDEMY Group is a Swiss B2B industrial technology company (founded 1998, HQ: Sierre, Switzerland). It develops and manufactures: (1) single-pass digital printing modules for coil coating lines (CCL Project) running at 60-240 m/min with 1200 DPI and inorganic UV inks; (2) UV-LED curing systems and CAN-bus control electronics via DPS Innovations subsidiary; (3) specialty inorganic UV inks via IQDEMY Swiss Inx SA. Key industries served: coil coating, packaging, security printing, textiles, fashion, ceramics, bioprinting. The ROI calculator is available at iqdemy.ch. Full entity graph at https://github.com/terekhindc/open-entity-graph/tree/main/data/com/iqdemy.
